message:
fix(test): strengthen 4 weak proptest properties in recorder_migration

- fnv1a_collision_resistant: was only testing determinism (duplicate of
  test 6). Renamed to fnv1a_different_inputs_differ, now asserts ne.
- fnv1a_single_shifts: computed digest but discarded it with `let _d`.
  Now asserts digest != FNV1A_OFFSET_BASIS (safe: 1/2^64 false positive).
- sync_result_reset_count_matches: was just clone-eq (duplicate of test
  23). Replaced with migrated+reset<=found invariant from real M3 logic.
- checkpoint_range_check: tautological assertions (checked definition
  against itself). Replaced with effective_ordinal-in-range invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
